English: Pearly was the one that actually imbued it with spiritual powers, right?

Japanese: だからあたし、よく知らないん だよねー。その勾玉のチカラ。
English: That's why I don't really know much about what it can do.

Japanese: （これで、倉院流・将来の 家元さんかよ‥‥）
English: (This is the woman that's going to take over the Kurain Channeling School someday!?)

Japanese: で？　で？　そのサイコ・ロック、 どうやって解除するの？
English: So how do you do it? How do you break the Psyche-Lock thing?

Japanese: ‥‥この勾玉をね。ヒミツを持った ヒトに、つきつけるんだ。
English: ...Well, you present the Magatama to the person with the secret.

Japanese: うう‥‥ちょっとワクワクするね。 ほら、ほら。やってみようよ！
English: ...Cool! I can't wait to see it in action! Come on! Try it out!

Japanese: （やれやれ‥‥）
English: (Oh boy... I think the future Master still needs to learn how to be patient...)

Japanese: 哀牙さん‥‥あなたは 知っているはずじゃないですか。
English: Mr. Atmey... You must know more than you're letting on.

Japanese: 怪人☆仮面マスクが、どうやって ツボを盗み出したか‥‥？
English: How did Mask☆DeMasque manage to steal the Sacred Urn...?

Japanese: ‥‥ナゾがナゾであるためには、 ナゾでなければならないのですよ。
English: In order for a secret to remain a secret, it must be kept secret.

Japanese: （星威岳　哀牙はゆうべ、 仮面マスクと対決したはずだ）
English: (Last night Luke Atmey must have encountered Mask☆DeMasque...)

Japanese: （なぜ、そのことを かくそうとするのか‥‥？）
English: (But why would he be trying to hide it...?)

Japanese: なるほどくん！　ここはいっちょ、 さいこ・ろっくを解除しようよ！
English: Nick! Go for it! Let's break that Psyche-Lock of his!

Japanese: （‥‥ちゃんとイミがわかって 言ってるのかな‥‥）
English: (...I don't really think she understands what she's talking about.)

Japanese: （とりあえず、やってみるか ‥‥ひさしぶりに）
English: (Well, it's been a while, but let's give this a shot...)

Japanese: ‥‥貴方のスイリには、“真実”の ヒラメキがなきにしもあらず。
English: I can't deny that there may be a small hint of "truth" in what you say.

Japanese: 怪人にひっぱたかれて、 キゼツしちゃったワケですね？
English: So, you were knocked out when the thief first clobbered you?

Japanese: ミもフタもない言いかたをすると ‥‥そうなるのかもしれぬ。
English: Clobber... What an ugly way of saying it. But I suppose you could put it that way.

Japanese: コムピュウタに目をやった、その 一瞬のスキをつかれたのです！
English: The coward struck at the precise moment that I turned to look at the computer.

Japanese: 怪人が倉庫に入って来たのに 気づかなかったんですか？
English: So you never noticed that the thief had entered the warehouse?

Japanese: 扉以外に、ダクトやら排水口やら アナだらけだったゆえ‥‥
English: No, the coward must have wormed his way in through somewhere besides the door...

Japanese: まっこと、ヒキョウなり 仮面マスク！
English: Perhaps the air ducts or the sewer pipes...

Japanese: この好敵手の後ろアタマを、 このような危険なもので殴るとは！
English: Then my arch-nemesis struck me on the head from behind with this gruesome item here!

Japanese: 怒ってるよ、探偵さん。
English: Ouch. He should have his poor head examined.

Japanese: 油断する方が悪いような 気もするけどな。
English: You can say that again. How could he have underestimated the thief that badly?

Japanese: 証拠品《七支刀》のデータを 書きなおした。
English: Shichishito updated in the Court Record.

Japanese: あの‥‥どういうコトですか？
English: So... What did you mean by he had a "very good reason"?

Japanese: 天杉　優作は、仮面マスクとして 犯行を重ねる理由があるのです。
English: Exactly that. Mr. DeLite had a very good reason to dress up and commit those crimes.

Japanese: 彼の部屋に、ミドリ色の封書が あるはず。
English: There should be a green envelope somewhere in his room.

Japanese: ‥‥調べてみることですな。
English: ...You'll need to go and investigate.

Japanese: ど、どうして そんなコトを、あなたが‥‥？
English: B-But how would you know about that...?

Japanese: フッ‥‥お忘れかな？
English: Hmph. Have you forgotten?

Japanese: 我こそは、天上天下にその名を ヒビかせた探偵中の探偵中の探偵！
English: You're speaking to the finest Ace Detective ever to walk on the face of the earth!

Japanese: 自他ともに認める星威岳　哀牙、 そのヒトですからな！
English: The most brilliant mind since ...well, EVER! Luke Atmey!

Japanese: （とにかく‥‥調べてみた ほうがいいな‥‥）
English: (*sigh* Well, I guess we'd better go take a look, just in case...)

Japanese: ～仮面マスクの手口～
English: -- Mask☆DeMasque's M. O. --

Japanese: 哀牙さん。あなたが現場で 見張っていた以上‥‥、
English: Detective Atmey, you were standing guard at the scene of the crime...

Japanese: 仮面マスクの犯行を 見ていないハズがないんですよ。
English: There's no way you didn't see Mask☆DeMasque commit the crime.

Japanese: やあやあ、これは いかなるゴアイサツですかな。
English: Well now, I can hardly see why you're so positive about that.

Japanese: この哀牙、たしかに倉庫の扉を 見張っておりました。
English: Yes, indeed I was guarding the warehouse. That much is true.

Japanese: ゆうべ、なんぴとたりとも、 あの扉は通らなかった！
English: But I can tell you for certain that not a single person passed through that door.

Japanese: （理由はわからないけど‥‥ 哀牙さんは、ウソをついている）
English: (I'm not sure why... But this Atmey guy is lying through his teeth.)

Japanese: （‥‥そうだ。 その証拠を示すんだ！）
English: (...I know. I'll show him some proof!)

Japanese: 哀牙さん。ゆうべ、あの扉を 通った人物がいるハズなんです！
English: Detective Atmey, I have here proof that someone went through that door last night!

Japanese: この哀牙に証拠をつきつけるとは ‥‥なかなか、おもしろい。
English: How very interesting that you would present such a thing to me, Luke Atmey, Ace Detective.

Japanese: ただ、ザンネンなのは‥‥ それが、なんのイミも持たぬコト。
English: Unfortunately... It is meaningless.

Japanese: ‥‥ウチへ帰って、冷たいシャワア をあびて、寝ることですな。
English: You need to go home, take a long, cold shower and get a good night's rest, Sir Lawyer.

Japanese: （ハズレ、ってコトか‥‥）
English: (I guess that's a miss...)

Japanese: いかがかな？ まだ、この哀牙に、ナニか‥‥？
English: Well then...? Is there something else I can do for you?

Japanese: （もしかしたら‥‥まだ、 証拠が足りないのかもしれない）
English: (Hmm... Maybe I don't have enough evidence yet.)

Japanese: （それなら、深追いは キケンだけど‥‥）
English: (If that's true, it could be dangerous for me to push on. But, I need to break him!)

Japanese: 現場には、防犯カメラが セットされていました。
English: There was a security camera set up at the scene of the crime.

Japanese: あの扉を通った人物は、 自動的に撮影されていたはずです。
English: It should have automatically taken a photo of anyone that went through that door.

Japanese: ‥‥いかにも‥‥。
English: ...Precisely.

Japanese: 勝手ですが、その撮影データを 見せてもらいました。
English: I hope you don't mind, but we've already gotten our hands on the camera data.

Japanese: この通り、ゆうべ１回、 カメラが作動してます！
English: As you can see, the camera went off exactly once last night.
Wha...!

Japanese: し、しかし‥‥我がマナコは 何者の姿も、とらえていない。
English: B-But my monocle didn't catch anyone in its flash!

Japanese: おそらく‥‥コムピュウタのミス ‥‥誤動作にすぎぬッ！
English: It must be some kind of computer malfunction... It-It must be...!

Japanese: 誤動作したのは‥‥哀牙さんの マナコの方だったかもしれません。
English: Maybe it was your monocle that malfunctioned.

Japanese: な‥‥なんですと！　この哀牙が、 扉から目をはなした、とでも？
English: Wh-What!? Are you saying that I didn't do my duty properly?

Japanese: 哀牙さん。ゆうべ、あなたは 怪人に会っているはずです！
English: Detective Atmey. You must have seen the thief last night.

Japanese: しかし！　なぜかあなたは、 それをかくそうとしている。
English: The question is why are you trying to hide it!

Japanese: （かくす以上‥‥そこには、 何か、原因があるにちがいない）
English: (If he's hiding it, there must be some reason!)

Japanese: （名探偵にふさわしくない、 人に言えない“原因”が‥‥）
English: (Some reason that he desperately wants to keep hidden...)

Japanese: （あの“証拠品”が、 それを立証してくれるはずだ！）
English: (And I've got just the piece of evidence that should prove it!)

Japanese: おそらくあなたは、仮面マスクの 姿を見ることができなかった。
English: OK, let's suppose you didn't manage to see Mask☆DeMasque.

Japanese: なぜなら！ そのとき、あなたは‥‥
English: In that case, the reason you didn't at that time was because you were...

Japanese: ‥‥スイリはつねに、 美しくなければならない。
English: ...I'm afraid that making a guess is not enough.

Japanese: 貴方のスイリ‥‥そのコンキョたる 証拠を見せていただこうッ！
English: Time to put your money where your mouth is. Show me your evidence!

Japanese: ‥‥ひとつ、いいコトを 教えてしんぜよう‥‥弁護士殿。
English: ...May I give you a piece of good advice, Sir Lawyer?

Japanese: な、なんですか？
English: Wh-What is it?

Japanese: ‥‥ハッタリは、真のスイリとは 言えないのですよ。
English: ...A guess is not the same as a theory. Not scientifically, anyway.

Japanese: ウチへ帰って、冷たいシャワア をあびて、寝ることですな。
English: You need to go home, take a long, cold shower and get a good night's rest, Sir Lawyer.

Japanese: （‥‥もう一度だ！ 考えなおしてみよう！）
English: (Argh! I guess I need to think this over again!)

Japanese: 哀牙さん‥‥
English: Detective Atmey...

Japanese: あなたは、怪人に キゼツさせられたのでしょうッ！
English: You were knocked unconscious by the thief, weren't you!?

Japanese: ハッハ！　これはしたり！ ジョオクがお上手ですな‥‥。
English: Ha ha ha! Surely you must be joking...

Japanese: こ、こ、こ、この哀牙が、 あろうことか、キゼツなど！
English: You think that I, Luke Atmey, could be knocked unconscious so easily!?

Japanese: このカタナが‥‥その証拠です。
English: This sword proves it!

Japanese: ‥‥！　そ、それは‥‥
English: Th-That's...

Japanese: 事件が起こる前、このカタナは‥‥ 綾里　供子像の手にありました。
English: Before the theft, this sword was in the hand of the statue of Ami Fey.

Japanese: それに‥‥そのときは、 曲がっていなかった。
English: Furthermore... at that time, it was not bent.

Japanese: う‥‥うむむ‥‥
English: Aaah... Err...

Japanese: ‥‥コタエはひとつ。
English: ...There's only one explanation.

Japanese: あなたは、このカタナで、 アタマをコツンとやられたのです！
English: You were struck on the head and knocked unconscious by this sword!

Japanese: どうですか！　哀牙さん！
English: Well, Detective!? What about it!?

Japanese: ‥‥さすがは、名弁護士殿‥‥
English: ...I'm impressed. You truly are an "Ace Attorney"...

Japanese: これは‥‥仮面マスクとして 自首した青年ですな。
English: This man surrendered to the police, admitting that he was Mask☆DeMasque.

Japanese: ええ‥‥。でも、本当に 怪人なのかどうか‥‥
English: Maybe so... But I'm not convinced that he's really behind the thefts.

Japanese: 怪人です。
English: He is.

Japanese: ‥‥断言したよ。
English: ...He sounds pretty sure.

Japanese: このヒタイの大きさや、 目ジリや口もとのあたり‥‥
English: Just look at his forehead. It's all in the shape of his mouth and eyes...

Japanese: これぞ完全ムケツ・“怪人型”の 人相なのですよ！
English: This is the classic face of a thief. It is unmistakable!

Japanese: ‥‥“人相”って言われても‥‥
English: Is there anything that isn't "unmistakable" to you...

Japanese: 同日　某時刻 哀牙探偵事務所
English: October 12 Atmey Detective Agency

Japanese: あっ、なるほどくん！ 真宵さま！
English: Ah! Mr. Nick! Mystic Maya!

Japanese: はみちゃん！
English: Pearly!

Japanese: もう二度と‥‥お会い できないかと思いましたっ！
English: I never thought I'd see the two of you again!

Japanese: ‥‥それで、 探偵さんはルスなの？
English: ...So is Mr. Ace Detective out of the office?

Japanese: ええ。わたくしが ここにたどりついたときには、
English: Yes, when I arrived here...

Japanese: どなたも いらっしゃいませんでした。
English: ...there wasn't a single soul in sight.

Japanese: ね、ね、なるほどくん。
English: Say, Nick...

Japanese: なんか‥‥さっき来たときと、 ようすがちがう気がしない？
English: Doesn't it look like something's changed since we were here last?

Japanese: （言われてみれば‥‥）
English: (Now that you mention it...)

Japanese: （どうやら‥‥今日の調査は ここまで、みたいだな）
English: (It looks like we're done investigating for the day.)

Japanese: クックックックッ‥‥弁護士殿。
English: Hee hee hee hee hee... Sir Lawyer...

Japanese: 今ここに、最高のステエジが ととのったようですな。
English: The stage has been set and all the pieces are finally in place.

Japanese: あとは、フィイヴァア！ ‥‥おどるだけ、なのですよ。
English: All that remains now... is for the dance to begin!

Japanese: （ナゾの検事に、名探偵に怪人‥‥ ヤッカイな裁判になりそうだな）
English: (A new prosecutor, an Ace Detective and a thief... This will be one tough trial.)

Japanese: つづく
English: To be continued.

Japanese: このバッグ‥‥ さっきは、なかったよね。
English: This bag... I'm sure it wasn't here before.

Japanese: 何が入っているのでしょう。 ‥‥ずいぶん、大きいです。
English: It looks quite full... I wonder what could be in here?

Japanese: ほらほら、なるほどくん。 出番だよ。
English: Hey, Nick! Come on! Open it up!

Japanese: え！　マズいだろ 勝手にさわっちゃ！
English: Hey! Wait a minute! We can't just open his private property!

Japanese: いいって、いいって。 さっさと調査する。
English: Don't be such a fuddy-duddy! This is an important investigation!

Japanese: （ううん‥‥ まあ、キョーミはあるし‥‥）
English: (That's true... And truth be told, I have to admit I am kind of curious...)

Japanese: どう？　何が入ってる？
English: Well? What's in there?

Japanese: ちょ、ちょっと待てよ。 今、取り出すから‥‥
English: H-Hang on a sec. I'm taking it out now...

Japanese: （どうやら‥‥何か、つるつるで カタいもの‥‥みたいだな‥‥）
English: (Whatever it is, it feels... kinda hard... and smooth...)

Japanese: ‥‥あいや、しばらくッ！
English: ...Well, hello there!!

Japanese: きゃわああッ！　出たァ！
English: EEEEEEK! H-He's here!

Japanese: ‥‥これはこれは、弁護士殿。
English: ...What are you doing, Sir Lawyer?

Japanese: どうやら‥‥社会のルウルを いささか、ムシされているようだ。
English: I'm shocked to see a servant of the court ignoring the law so flagrantly!

Japanese: あ‥‥スミマセン。 コイツがですね‥‥
English: I-I'm really sorry! M-Maya made me do it!

Japanese: ナニよ、コイツって！
English: Nick! I can't believe you!

Japanese: 紳士はイイワケしないもの。 ‥‥それより、弁護士殿。
English: A gentleman never uses a lady as an excuse for his own poor behavior...

Japanese: こんなところでグズグズしていて、 よろしいのですかな？
English: The real question is... Can you afford to waste time lollygagging about here?

Japanese: ど‥‥どういうことですか？
English: Wh-What do you mean by that?

Japanese: この哀牙‥‥ 断言してさしあげましょう。
English: Perhaps I should make myself more clear?

Japanese: 明日の裁判は‥‥ズヴァリ！
English: Tomorrow's trial... Zvarri!

Japanese: シュトルム・ウント・ドランク！ ‥‥荒れもだえ、たけび狂うッ！
English: Shall we say the figurative Sir William will be dropping his panties before lunchtime.

Japanese: なんかスゴそうだよ、 なるほどくん‥‥
English: Wow, Nick! Sounds like it's gonna be really exciting.

Japanese: ね。なるほどくん。 何が入ってたの？　バッグ。
English: So what's in there, Nick? What's in the bag?

Japanese: 見てないよ。いきなり “あいや！”って来たから。
English: The way Atmey barged in like that, I never actually got the chance to look!

Japanese: わたくし、もう死んでしまうかと 思いました。
English: I know. I thought I was going to collapse of shock, too!

Japanese: （ぼくがさわった感じだと、 何かカタいものだったけど‥‥）
English: (But from the feel of it, it was something hard...)

Japanese: あの‥‥明日の裁判、 何が起きるんですか？
English: Umm... What's going to happen at the trial tomorrow that's so dramatic?

Japanese: ‥‥弁護士殿。貴方の最大の アヤマチは‥‥ただ１つ！
English: Do you know what your biggest mistake so far has been, Sir Lawyer?

Japanese: 弁護士になってしまったコトです。
English: ...It was becoming a lawyer in the first place.

Japanese: ‥‥かなりコンポン的な 問題ですね。
English: ...That certainly does sound like a big mistake, Mr. Nick.

Japanese: 明日の法廷では‥‥この哀牙がッ！ サッソウと証言台に立ちます。
English: Tomorrow will be a day to remember. I, Luke Atmey, will take the stand!

Japanese: そして、ズヴァリ！ 引導をおわたしいたしましょうぞ。
English: And then... Zvarri! My testimony will prove to be the undoing of the lot of you!

Japanese: そう！　貴方がた、怪人一味に！
English: Yes! All of you! I will unmask you as the thief's co-conspirators!

Japanese: い、いちみ‥‥
English: C-C-Conspirators!?

Japanese: クックックックックッ‥‥ うなだれるのは、まだ早いですぞ！
English: Hee hee hee hee hee... You're quick on the defensive, I see! However!

Japanese: 貴方がたの最大の敵は、 この哀牙だけにあらず。
English: It is not I that is your greatest enemy!

Japanese: さらに“強”にして“大”なオトコ が、貴方の前に立ちはだかる。
English: There is a far more dangerous threat that you will face during the trial.

Japanese: そ‥‥それは、いったい‥‥？
English: Wh-What are you talking about...?

Japanese: 弁護士殿。‥‥貴方も弁護士なら 聞いたコトがおありでしょう。
English: Sir Lawyer... If you truly are who you say, I'm sure you've heard of him.

Japanese: ‥‥“ゴドー”の名を。
English: His name is "Godot".
G-Godot...?

Japanese: あの。ダレですか？ “ゴドー”さん、って‥‥？
English: Um... Who is this "Godot" person...?

Japanese: ‥‥霊媒師たるおじょうさんが ご存じないのもムリはない。
English: ...It's not surprising that a spirit medium has not heard the name.

Japanese: ゴドー‥‥天下の検事局に 比類するものなき、孤高の検事。
English: Godot. The prosecutor whose equal cannot be found in this country, but in heaven.

Japanese: そのオトコは‥‥あらゆるナゾを その身にまとっていると言います。
English: Godot. A legend or myth... Men pin a lifetime of hopes on the chance to simply meet him.

Japanese: けんじさん‥‥
English: Prosecutor...

Japanese: で‥‥でも！　なるほどくんの 最強の敵は‥‥みつるぎ検事です！
English: But the best prosecutor in the country isn't Godot, it's Mr. Edgeworth!

Japanese: ね！　なるほどくん！
English: Isn't that right, Nick!?

Japanese: ‥‥霊媒師たるおじょうさんが ご存じないのもムリはない。
English: ...It's no surprise that a spirit medium such as yourself would know nothing of this.

Japanese: 天才検事・御剣　怜侍（みつるぎ れいじ）は今、この国にいません。
English: But Ace Prosecutor Miles Edgeworth is currently traveling abroad.
Huh...?

Japanese: 御剣　怜侍が、その“最強”の 称号をたくしたオトコこそが‥‥
English: In fact, it was Mr. Edgeworth who acknowledged Godot as the best in this country.

Japanese: ゴドーさん‥‥なのですか。
English: And you agree with that?

Japanese: 《法廷界の星威岳　哀牙》‥‥ そう申しあげてもいいでしょう。
English: Most certainly. In fact, you could call him the Luke Atmey of the Prosecutor's Office.

Japanese: それを聞くと、なんかちょっと 安心しちゃうね。
English: Well, that's good to hear! The prosecution has a fighting chance tomorrow!

Japanese: なるほどくん、《ゴドー》検事‥‥ そんなにスゴい方なのですか？
English: Mr. Nick, is this "Godot" really that strong?

Japanese: ぼくも、ウワサしか 聞いたことはないんだけど‥‥
English: Hmm... I seem to remember hearing about someone like that...

Japanese: なにしろ‥‥あらゆるナゾを 身にまとっていますからな。
English: Not surprising... Some people spend their entire lives idly waiting for his appearance.

Japanese: 貴方も、愚かな道に 足をふみ入れてしまいましたな。
English: You have taken a step down the path of foolishness.

Japanese: 極刑をまぬがれ得ない 怪人の弁護に立つとは‥‥
English: To try to defend a career criminal who deserves nothing less than the death penalt--

Japanese: 優作さんが仮面マスクだと 決まったワケじゃありません！
English: Hey! Last time I checked, no one knows for sure that Mr. DeLite really is DeMasque!

Japanese: クックックックックッ‥‥ おじょうさん。
English: Hee hee hee hee hee... My dear lady...

Japanese: 時代はうつろいやすく、 人のココロもまた同じ‥‥。
English: Times may change, but people, sadly, do not...

Japanese: ‥‥まあ。貴方にも いずれ、わかるでしょう‥‥。
English: ...Well. You will understand this when you are more mature.

Japanese: あの、哀牙さん。 ちょっと見てほしいんですけど‥‥
English: Ummm, Mr. Atmey...? Could you take a look at this?

Japanese: やめておきましょう、弁護士殿。
English: Oh please. You can drop the pretense already.
Huh...?

Japanese: ワレワレはすでに、 戦うウンメイをせおっている。
English: You and I are already fated to fight each other...

Japanese: 法廷の戦士に与えられたる 武器こそ、情報。
English: And the only true weapon for warriors in a court of law is information!

Japanese: せいぜい、みがきぬいて おこうではありませぬか！
English: Surely you don't expect me to sharpen your sword for you!

Japanese: ‥‥けち。
English: ...Creep.
